name: Solar SPV 1kW
description: Solar refers to energy from the Sun that can be captured and used for electricity or heat. Using technologies like photovoltaic (PV) panels and solar thermal systems, solar power converts sunlight into clean, renewable energy with little to no emissions during operation. It's commonly used on rooftops, solar farms, and in off-grid setups to lower electricity bills, reduce reliance on fossil fuels, and support sustainable living.
